axioms.name: Trust
axioms.statement: Trust is a pre-commitment to unobserved future transitions of the other.

axioms.name: Belief
axioms.statement: Belief is a stabilized hypothesis about world-transition rules.
axioms.failure_mode: illusion = persistent mismatch with world DeltaPhi

axioms.name: Promise
axioms.statement: Promise is distributed commitment to future DeltaPhi.
